name: obsidian-query-control
description: An experimental Obsidian plugin that adds additional control to queries

scripts.release: node scripts/updateManifestVersion.js && git add manifest.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && pnpm run tag-version
scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch -m "chore(release): %s" && node scripts/updateManifestVersion.js && git add manifest.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && pnpm run tag-version
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor -m "chore(release): %s" && node scripts/updateManifestVersion.js && git add manifest.json && git commit --amend --no-edit && pnpm run tag-version
